summary: C# API proxy integration testing complete. All backend proxy endpoints working correctly. Full booking flow from Home page to Car Selection with real C# API data verified. Google Maps Autocomplete integration working. Mobile responsive design confirmed.

POST /api/proxy/distance.details: Returns vehicle pricing from C# API. Tested with CDG->Eiffel Tower coordinates.

POST /api/proxy/preorder-distance.details: Returns fixed preorder pricing. Returns 3 vehicle types: Premium, Luxury Sedan, Sedan with images, passengers, luggage, duration, distance.

GET /api/proxy/vehicle-image/{imagePath}.details: Proxies vehicle images from C# backend. Returns PNG images with proper content-type.

home_page_loads.details: Home page loads with booking form, hero section, popular destinations, trust blocks

google_maps_autocomplete.details: PlacesAutocomplete component works - selecting addresses populates coordinates. Geocoding fallback available.

booking_form_submission.details: Form submits pickup/dropoff addresses, date, time. Calls preorder-distance API and navigates to car-selection.

car_selection_page.details: Displays real vehicle data from C# API including: vehicle types, prices, images, passengers, luggage, duration, distance

route_summary.details: Shows pickup/dropoff addresses, Est. travel time (~Xmin), Distance (~Xkm)

vehicle_cards.details: 3 vehicle cards displayed with RECOMMENDED tag on first, Select buttons functional

auth_modal_on_select.details: Clicking Select without auth triggers auth modal with Sign up/Sign in options

empty_state.details: Direct navigation to /car-selection shows 'No search data found' with 'Start a New Search' button

home_page_mobile.details: Home page properly responsive on mobile (390x844), booking form stacked vertically

car_selection_mobile.details: Car selection page properly responsive, vehicle cards stack vertically, all content readable

critical_code_review_comments: All proxy endpoints properly forward to C# API at api.zont.cab
Vehicle images properly proxied with cache headers
Frontend correctly uses transferService.calculatePreorderPrice() for pricing
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements
BookingContext properly stores vehicleResults for display
seed_data_creation: None - uses real C# API data from api.zont.cab
context_for_next_testing_agent: C# API proxy integration fully tested. Backend proxy routes at /api/proxy/* forward to api.zont.cab. Frontend booking flow: Home page form → Car Selection with real vehicle data working. Google Maps Autocomplete integration functional. Mobile responsive design verified.

mocked_api.note: No APIs are mocked. All data comes from real C# backend at api.zont.cab via proxy endpoints.
